text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Mejiro Bright having not shown up for
training, I head off to look for her. Then, while
searching...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Wooow... That cloud looks just like a little bird...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Are you flying over to that big, puffy cloud, little
bird?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You can make it! It's perfectly fine to drift slowly
but surely. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, greetings, Trainer. I've been gazing at the
clouds up in the sky.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Why, it's as if a story is unfolding before my very
eyes. I could watch them all day.
choice_data_list: Would that leave time for training?
Would that leave time for training?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I apologize, sincerely... I only meant to gaze at
the clouds for a few moments...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I have brought shame to the Mejiro name. You
have my word that this will not happen again...
